items.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The Dow Industrials fell about 785 points Thursday as oil prices surged amid the U.S.-Iran war. The 30-stock index is on track for its worst week sinc...

items.title: U.S. crude oil tops $80 per barrel as escalating Iran war disrupts global fuel supplies
items.description: Oil prices have surged about 20% this week as the U.S.-Iran war engulfs the Middle East.

items.title: Some banks raised CD yields last month. Where you can still snag 4%
